CVE-2022-24713.2eb39b72376ff1efb19891c086b6ea9d8c745d3b:
Update regex crate to prevent ReDoS issues

We don't currently use untrusted regex grammars to parse data,
but this update to the regex crate would prevent it in the event
someone were to add functionality like that in the future. See
CVE-2022-24713 for more details.
CVE-2022-24713.cf4a184f8c8a4177e2aef0b80db1715cffc0f095:
Bump rust regex crate to 1.5.5.

Address `cargo audit` warnings about CVE-2022-24713 by updating
our version of the regex crate to the current release.

We only use static regular expressions with this crate, so we
are not vulnerable to the issue with 1.5.4.

See https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2022-0013 for more info.

Port of #12527 to release
CVE-2022-24713.a7c004479d3ddab6a96c0cdabc130706213f41f6:
Bump rust regex crate to 1.5.5.

Address `cargo audit` warnings about CVE-2022-24713 by updating
our version of the regex crate to the current release.

We only use static regular expressions with this crate, so we
are not vulnerable to the issue with 1.5.4.

See https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2022-0013 for more info.
